mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eval_runs (run_key, prompt_version_id, total_cases, passed_cases, avg_score, status, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{runKey}, #{promptVersionId}, #{totalCases}, #{passedCases}, #{avgScore}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, run_key, prompt_version_id, total_cases, passed_cases, avg_score, status, started_at, finished_at, created_at FROM eval_runs WHERE run_key = #{runKey}
SELECT id, run_key, prompt_version_id, total_cases, passed_cases, avg_score, status, started_at, finished_at, created_at FROM eval_runs ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, run_key, prompt_version_id, total_cases, passed_cases, avg_score, status, started_at, finished_at, created_at FROM eval_runs WHERE id = #{id}
